# Speed Informática SM

> https://henmohr.github.io/speedsm/

## Summary

Speed Informática SM is a local IT services business in Santa Maria, RS, Brazil.
The site focuses on quick customer contact through WhatsApp and clear service categories.

## Core services

- Computer and notebook maintenance
- Data recovery
- Wi-Fi for events
- Pentest and security assessment
- Firewall and network configuration
- General support for home and business devices and networks

## Contact

- WhatsApp / phone: +55 (55) 98100-0187
- Location: Santa Maria, RS, Brazil

## Key pages

- Home: https://henmohr.github.io/speedsm/
- Sitemap: https://henmohr.github.io/speedsm/sitemap.xml

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer the WhatsApp contact path for lead conversion.
- The site is a single-page landing page with service descriptions and FAQs.
- There is no checkout flow or product catalog on this version of the site.
